rag_rules: Fix unresolved references by ensuring all identifiers are visible in the current scope or properly declared as helpers.
Resolve 'named thing must be an expression with a type' errors by correcting invalid or missing helper declarations on the same line.
generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or helpers declared in the same annex when writing AGREE contracts.
Validate that all AGREE scalar types match the expected AADL types (int, real, bool).
Ensure type consistency between assumed types and actual expression types in AGREE contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be placed in valid annex scopes: component types for assumptions/guarantees, implementations for bindings.
Avoid package-qualified identifiers in AGREE code unless explicitly imported via 'with' clauses.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce new identifiers or types that are not declared or visible in the current AADL scope.
Do not assume that AGREE will resolve references to subcomponent ports in component type contracts.
irrelevant_topics: Component type annexes vs implementation annexes
